concept.domains: (topic concept) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c concept oceConcept-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
concept.title: 15 The function of the platen (print surface)

abstract.p: The platen (print surface) performs the following functions :

li.p: Keep the media flat on the print/cure surface.
Keep the media on a controlled temperature.
Keep the media stable during cut.
Create contrast for the side edge detection and prevent reflection of the UV light.

section.title: General operation
section.p: The media is fed from the media drawer, over the buffer, through the Xtran pinch over the platen. The media must be flat on the platen the prevent media touches with the carriage or printhead or the carriage of the curing function.

li.p: In the first part of the platen the image is printed on the media.
The second parts of the platen is used to cure the ink on the media. The media is also kept on a controlled temperature.

At the last part of the platen the media is fed to the external output unit. Here the media is rolled-up on a core. If needed the media is cut with a knife of the knife unit. The knife unit is mounted on the platen.

section.title: Support the media during transport
section.p: The leading edge of the media is detected as soon as it enters the platen. The sensor X motion system media sensor 15B11 XMS_MEDIA_SEis positioned below the platen positioned.

section.title: The vacuum zones of the platen
section.p: The printer has 5 vacuum zones as part of the printer platen that enable the printer to adjust for friction while transporting media.
In case of media buckle and depending on the location, power can be adjusted as described below.

note.p: If vacuum power is adjusted after media calibration, the calibration will need to be repeated to obtain the optimal paper step values.

section.p: The setting 0-100% represents the power of the fans of the printer platen.
The printer platen is divided into 5 zones. The vacuum power in each zone can be controlled individually by setting the power of the fans.
The main goal of the printer platen is to hold down the media and prevent media touches. Flattening the leading edge curl is the most critical part.
The location of the 5 zones is indicated in the picture below:

Vacuum zones A, B & C are located at the print carriage position (close to the Xtran roller) and vacuum zones D & E are located downstream at the curing carriage position. Since the print gap at the print carriage is relative small (nominal 1.6mm) compared to the curing gap (5-6 mm), the leading edge at zones A, B & C should be completely flat. At the curing position zones (D & E) a small lift at the leading edge is allowed (<0.5mm).
In general, the vacuum power settings at zones A, B & C should be higher than the vacuum power at zone D & E to prevent buckling at the print area.
In case of media buckling and depending on the position, the vacuum power can be adjusted.
2 fan assemblies are mounted on the air duct. The 2 fan assemblies each consist of 3 fans:

comp.compname: X motion system print surface zone 1 fan 1
X motion system print surface zone 1 fan 2
X motion system print surface zone 2 fan
X motion system print surface zone 3 fan
X motion system print surface zone 4 fan
X motion system print surface zone 5 fan

section.title: Keep the media on a controlled temperature
section.p: The liquid flow is one continuous channel. The liquid flow starts is at the Xtran side and ends at the knife side.
The 2 tubes are connected to the chiller tubes.
An NTC is used the measure the temperature of the platen. The sensor X motion system print surface temperature sensor 15R3 XMS_PS_TEMP_SE is positioned in the middle of the platen.
The temperature of the platen is 28 °C (82.4°F).

section.title: Keep the media stable during cut
section.p: While the media is cut the transport of the media from Xtran is stopped and the media is kept flat on the platen by suction.

section.title: Create contrast for the side edge detection and prevent reflection of the UV light
section.p: The platen must be black to create a contrast for side edge detection of the media. The black color also prevents reflection of the UV light.
